Operational Technology (OT) Security Engineer

Location(s)
Zhuhai, Guangdong
Company
Molex
Career Field
Information Systems & Technology
Job Number
161128
Apply now
Share
  • Email
  • Facebook
  • X
  • LinkedIn

Your Job

Your Job As an OT Security Engineer at Molex, you will be in the forefront in the protection of our manufacturing from current and evolving cyber threats.


Our Team

You will be part of a dynamic worldwide Cyber security department tasked with protecting our companies’ digital assets, partnering with departments across the company securing the infrastructure used to make world class products and services.


What You Will Do

• Identify gaps in security of the infrastructure used to build our products
• Implement security solutions to improve the security posture of our OT environment
• Install and maintain security solutions for OT systems
• Monitor OT systems for security breaches or intrusions
• Respond to security incidents in our OT environment
• Discover and remediate vulnerabilities in our OT environment
• Partner with and evangelize security throughout our manufacturing sites
• Document OT security procedures and processes


Who You Are (Basic Qualifications)

• Industrial Control Systems (ICS) o Understanding of ICS architectures and components (e.g., SCADA, DCS, PLCs, HMIs). o Familiarity with ICS protocols (e.g., Modbus, DNP3, OPC). • Cybersecurity Fundamentals o Knowledge of basic cybersecurity principles (e.g., confidentiality, integrity, availability). o Understanding of network security concepts (e.g., firewalls, intrusion detection/prevention systems, VPNs). • Threat Landscape o Awareness of common threats and attack vectors specific to OT environments (e.g., malware, ransomware, insider threats). o Knowledge of threat intelligence sources and analysis. • Incident Response o Experience in developing and implementing incident response plans. • Network Architecture o Understanding of network segmentation and segregation principles. o Knowledge of secure network design and architecture. • Monitoring and Detection o Experience with security monitoring tools and techniques specific to OT (e.g., SIEM, anomaly detection systems). o Understanding of log management and analysis.


What Will Put You Ahead

  • Experience with Dragos OT Security Platform
  • Networking certifications such the Cisco CCNA or CCNP
  • Experience as a process control engineer
  • Understanding of risk mitigation strategies and frameworks (e.g., NIST, ISO 27001).
  • Familiarity with industry standards and regulations (e.g., NERC CIP, IEC 62443, NIST SP 800-82).

At Koch companies, we are entrepreneurs. This means we openly challenge the status quo, find new ways to create value and get rewarded for our individual contributions. Any compensation range provided for a role is an estimate determined by available market data. The actual amount may be higher or lower than the range provided considering each candidate's knowledge, skills, abilities, and geographic location. If you have questions, please speak to your recruiter about the flexibility and detail of our compensation philosophy.


Who We Are

As a Koch company, Molex is a leading supplier of connectors and interconnect components, driving

innovation in electronics and supporting industries from automotive to health care and consumer to

data communications. The thousands of innovators who work for Molex have made us a global

electronics leader. Our experienced people, groundbreaking products and leading-edge

technologies help us deliver a wider array of solutions to more markets than ever before.


At Koch, employees are empowered to do what they do best to make life better. Learn how our business philosophy helps employees unleash their potential while creating value for themselves and the company.

Additionally, everyone has individual work and personal needs. We seek to enable the best work environment that helps you and the business work together to produce superior results.

Apply now
